title: Pimpinella thomasii
taxonomy: Pimpinella thomasii is classified within the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. This classification places it within the order Apiales, a group of flowering plants that also includes the umbelliferous family. The genus Pimpinella itself is a group of flowering plants native to tropical and subtropical regions, with Pimpinella thomasii being one of the species found in these regions. Further classification within Pimpinella thomasii may involve its subgenus, tribe, and even species-level classification. Understanding the classification of Pimpinella thomasii can provide insights into its evolutionary history and relationships with other plants.
